instruction: Create a cube at /World/MyCube at position (1, 2, 3)
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdGeom, Gf
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
omni.kit.commands.execute('CreateMeshPrimWithDefaultXform', prim_type='Cube', prim_path='/World/MyCube')
xf = UsdGeom.Xformable(stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/MyCube'))
xf.AddTranslateOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(1, 2, 3))

instruction: Delete the prim at /World/OldRobot
expected_code:
import omni.usd
omni.kit.commands.execute('DeletePrims', paths=['/World/OldRobot'])

instruction: Rename /World/Cube to /World/RedCube
expected_code:
import omni.kit.commands
omni.kit.commands.execute('MovePrim', path_from='/World/Cube', path_to='/World/RedCube')

instruction: Create a sphere with radius 0.5 at the origin
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdGeom, Gf
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
omni.kit.commands.execute('CreateMeshPrimWithDefaultXform', prim_type='Sphere', prim_path='/World/Sphere')
prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/Sphere')
UsdGeom.Sphere(prim).GetRadiusAttr().Set(0.5)

instruction: Create an Xform scope called /World/Robots to organize my robot prims
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdGeom
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, '/World/Robots')

instruction: Add a USD reference to /World/Robot from the file /home/user/robot.usd
expected_code:
import omni.usd
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/Robot')
if not prim.IsValid():
    prim = stage.DefinePrim('/World/Robot')
prim.GetReferences().AddReference('/home/user/robot.usd')

instruction: Set the visibility of /World/Helper to invisible
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdGeom
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
imageable = UsdGeom.Imageable(stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/Helper'))
imageable.MakeInvisible()

instruction: Create a cylinder with height 2.0 and radius 0.3 at position (5, 0, 1)
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdGeom, Gf
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
omni.kit.commands.execute('CreateMeshPrimWithDefaultXform', prim_type='Cylinder', prim_path='/World/Cylinder')
prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/Cylinder')
UsdGeom.Cylinder(prim).GetHeightAttr().Set(2.0)
UsdGeom.Cylinder(prim).GetRadiusAttr().Set(0.3)
UsdGeom.Xformable(prim).AddTranslateOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(5, 0, 1))

instruction: Duplicate /World/Table and place the copy at /World/Table_Copy
expected_code:
import omni.kit.commands
omni.kit.commands.execute('CopyPrim', path_from='/World/Table', path_to='/World/Table_Copy')

instruction: Create a ground plane at Z=0
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import Gf
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
omni.kit.commands.execute('AddGroundPlaneCommand', stage=stage, planePath='/World/GroundPlane', axis='Z', size=2500.0, position=Gf.Vec3f(0, 0, 0), color=Gf.Vec3f(0.5))

instruction: Set the scale of the selected prim to (2, 2, 2)
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdGeom, Gf
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/Box')
xf = UsdGeom.Xformable(prim)
xf.AddScaleOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(2, 2, 2))

instruction: Rotate the selected mesh 90 degrees around the Z axis
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdGeom, Gf
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/Arm')
xf = UsdGeom.Xformable(prim)
xf.AddRotateZOp().Set(90.0)

instruction: List all mesh prims in the scene
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdGeom
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
meshes = [str(p.GetPath()) for p in stage.Traverse() if p.IsA(UsdGeom.Mesh)]
print(f'Found {len(meshes)} meshes:', meshes)

instruction: Save the current stage to /tmp/my_scene.usd
expected_code:
import omni.usd
omni.usd.get_context().get_stage().GetRootLayer().Export('/tmp/my_scene.usd')

instruction: Open the USD file at /home/user/scenes/warehouse.usd
expected_code:
import omni.usd
omni.usd.get_context().open_stage('/home/user/scenes/warehouse.usd')

instruction: Add rigid body physics to the selected cube
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdPhysics
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/Cube')
UsdPhysics.RigidBodyAPI.Apply(prim)
UsdPhysics.CollisionAPI.Apply(prim)

instruction: Set the mass of /World/Box to 5.0 kg
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdPhysics
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/Box')
if not prim.HasAPI(UsdPhysics.MassAPI):
    UsdPhysics.MassAPI.Apply(prim)
mass_api = UsdPhysics.MassAPI(prim)
mass_api.GetMassAttr().Set(5.0)

instruction: Add collision to the ground plane
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdPhysics
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/GroundPlane')
UsdPhysics.CollisionAPI.Apply(prim)

instruction: Create a physics scene with gravity set to -9.81 in Z
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdPhysics, Gf
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
scene = UsdPhysics.Scene.Define(stage, '/World/PhysicsScene')
scene.CreateGravityDirectionAttr(Gf.Vec3f(0, 0, -1))
scene.CreateGravityMagnitudeAttr(9.81)

instruction: Add a fixed joint between /World/Base and /World/Arm
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdPhysics
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
joint = UsdPhysics.FixedJoint.Define(stage, '/World/Base/FixedJoint')
joint.CreateBody0Rel().SetTargets(['/World/Base'])
joint.CreateBody1Rel().SetTargets(['/World/Arm'])

instruction: Add a revolute joint to /World/Robot/Shoulder with axis Y and limits -180 to 180
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdPhysics
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
joint = UsdPhysics.RevoluteJoint.Define(stage, '/World/Robot/Shoulder/RevoluteJoint')
joint.CreateAxisAttr('Y')
joint.CreateLowerLimitAttr(-180)
joint.CreateUpperLimitAttr(180)
joint.CreateBody0Rel().SetTargets(['/World/Robot'])
joint.CreateBody1Rel().SetTargets(['/World/Robot/Shoulder'])

instruction: Set friction to 0.8 on the selected prim
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdPhysics
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/Floor')
if not prim.HasAPI(UsdPhysics.MaterialAPI):
    UsdPhysics.MaterialAPI.Apply(prim)
mat = UsdPhysics.MaterialAPI(prim)
mat.CreateDynamicFrictionAttr().Set(0.8)
mat.CreateStaticFrictionAttr().Set(0.8)

instruction: What are the joint positions of the robot at /World/Franka?
expected_code:
from isaacsim.core.prims import SingleArticulation
art = SingleArticulation(prim_path='/World/Franka')
art.initialize()
positions = art.get_joint_positions()
print('Joint positions:', positions)

instruction: Set the joint target position for the robot's joint_3 to 1.57 radians
expected_code:
from isaacsim.core.prims import SingleArticulation
import numpy as np
art = SingleArticulation(prim_path='/World/Robot')
art.initialize()
idx = list(art.dof_names).index('joint_3')
positions = art.get_joint_positions()
positions[idx] = 1.57
art.set_joint_positions(positions)

instruction: Apply a contact sensor to the robot gripper at /World/Robot/Gripper
expected_code:
from isaacsim.sensors import ContactSensor
sensor = ContactSensor(prim_path='/World/Robot/Gripper/ContactSensor', name='gripper_contact', min_threshold=0.0, max_threshold=1000.0, radius=0.05)

instruction: Make this mesh a soft cloth that can drape over objects
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import PhysxSchema
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/Napkin')
PhysxSchema.PhysxDeformableSurfaceAPI.Apply(prim)
deform = PhysxSchema.PhysxDeformableSurfaceAPI(prim)
deform.CreateSelfCollisionAttr(True)
deform.CreateSolverPositionIterationCountAttr(32)
PhysxSchema.PhysxCollisionAPI.Apply(prim)

instruction: Create a sponge-like deformable body from the selected mesh
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import PhysxSchema
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/Sponge')
PhysxSchema.PhysxDeformableBodyAPI.Apply(prim)
deform = PhysxSchema.PhysxDeformableBodyAPI(prim)
deform.CreateSimulationHexahedralResolutionAttr(5)
deform.CreateSolverPositionIterationCountAttr(16)
PhysxSchema.PhysxCollisionAPI.Apply(prim)
material = PhysxSchema.PhysxDeformableBodyMaterialAPI.Apply(prim)
material.CreateYoungsModulusAttr(1000.0)
material.CreatePoissonsRatioAttr(0.3)
material.CreateDampingAttr(0.01)

instruction: Turn this mesh into a rubber-like soft body that bounces
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import PhysxSchema
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/Ball')
PhysxSchema.PhysxDeformableBodyAPI.Apply(prim)
deform = PhysxSchema.PhysxDeformableBodyAPI(prim)
deform.CreateSimulationHexahedralResolutionAttr(8)
deform.CreateSolverPositionIterationCountAttr(24)
PhysxSchema.PhysxCollisionAPI.Apply(prim)
material = PhysxSchema.PhysxDeformableBodyMaterialAPI.Apply(prim)
material.CreateYoungsModulusAttr(50000.0)
material.CreatePoissonsRatioAttr(0.45)
material.CreateDynamicFrictionAttr(0.8)

instruction: Make the selected mesh behave like gel or jelly
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import PhysxSchema
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/Gel')
PhysxSchema.PhysxDeformableBodyAPI.Apply(prim)
deform = PhysxSchema.PhysxDeformableBodyAPI(prim)
deform.CreateSimulationHexahedralResolutionAttr(6)
deform.CreateSolverPositionIterationCountAttr(32)
PhysxSchema.PhysxCollisionAPI.Apply(prim)
material = PhysxSchema.PhysxDeformableBodyMaterialAPI.Apply(prim)
material.CreateYoungsModulusAttr(500.0)
material.CreatePoissonsRatioAttr(0.49)
material.CreateDampingAttr(0.1)

instruction: Simulate a rope from this curve mesh
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import PhysxSchema
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/Rope')
PhysxSchema.PhysxDeformableBodyAPI.Apply(prim)
deform = PhysxSchema.PhysxDeformableBodyAPI(prim)
deform.CreateSimulationHexahedralResolutionAttr(4)
deform.CreateSelfCollisionAttr(True)
PhysxSchema.PhysxCollisionAPI.Apply(prim)
material = PhysxSchema.PhysxDeformableBodyMaterialAPI.Apply(prim)
material.CreateYoungsModulusAttr(100000.0)
material.CreatePoissonsRatioAttr(0.3)

instruction: Create an action graph for the selected robot that publishes joint states to ROS2
expected_code:
import omni.graph.core as og
keys = og.Controller.Keys
(graph, nodes, _, _) = og.Controller.edit('/World/Robot/ActionGraph',
    {keys.CREATE_NODES: [
        ('OnPlaybackTick', 'omni.graph.action.OnPlaybackTick'),
        ('PublishJointState', 'omni.isaac.ros2_bridge.ROS2PublishJointState'),
        ('ArticulationController', 'omni.isaac.core_nodes.IsaacArticulationController'),
    ],
    keys.SET_VALUES: [
        ('ArticulationController.inputs:robotPath', '/World/Robot'),
        ('PublishJointState.inputs:topicName', '/joint_states'),
    ],
    keys.CONNECT: [
        ('OnPlaybackTick.outputs:tick', 'PublishJointState.inputs:execIn'),
        ('OnPlaybackTick.outputs:tick', 'ArticulationController.inputs:execIn'),
    ]})

instruction: Set up an OmniGraph to subscribe to ROS2 twist commands and drive /World/Robot
expected_code:
import omni.graph.core as og
keys = og.Controller.Keys
(graph, nodes, _, _) = og.Controller.edit('/World/Robot/TwistSubscriberGraph',
    {keys.CREATE_NODES: [
        ('OnPlaybackTick', 'omni.graph.action.OnPlaybackTick'),
        ('SubscribeTwist', 'isaacsim.ros2.bridge.ROS2SubscribeTwist'),
        ('BreakLinear', 'omni.graph.nodes.Break3Vector'),
        ('BreakAngular', 'omni.graph.nodes.Break3Vector'),
        ('DifferentialController', 'isaacsim.robot.wheeled_robots.DifferentialController'),
        ('ArticulationController', 'isaacsim.core.nodes.IsaacArticulationController'),
    ],
    keys.SET_VALUES: [
        ('SubscribeTwist.inputs:topicName', '/cmd_vel'),
        ('DifferentialController.inputs:wheelRadius', 0.14),
        ('DifferentialController.inputs:wheelDistance', 0.4132),
        ('DifferentialController.inputs:maxLinearSpeed', 1.5),
        ('DifferentialController.inputs:maxAngularSpeed', 3.14),
        ('ArticulationController.inputs:robotPath', '/World/Robot'),
        ('ArticulationController.inputs:jointNames', ['joint_wheel_left', 'joint_wheel_right']),
    ],
    keys.CONNECT: [
        ('OnPlaybackTick.outputs:tick', 'SubscribeTwist.inputs:execIn'),
        ('SubscribeTwist.outputs:linearVelocity', 'BreakLinear.inputs:tuple'),
        ('SubscribeTwist.outputs:angularVelocity', 'BreakAngular.inputs:tuple'),
        ('SubscribeTwist.outputs:execOut', 'DifferentialController.inputs:execIn'),
        ('BreakLinear.outputs:x', 'DifferentialController.inputs:linearVelocity'),
        ('BreakAngular.outputs:z', 'DifferentialController.inputs:angularVelocity'),
        ('DifferentialController.outputs:velocityCommand', 'ArticulationController.inputs:velocityCommand'),
        ('OnPlaybackTick.outputs:tick', 'ArticulationController.inputs:execIn'),
    ]})

instruction: Create an OmniGraph action graph that reads and publishes a camera image to ROS2
expected_code:
import omni.graph.core as og
keys = og.Controller.Keys
(graph, nodes, _, _) = og.Controller.edit('/World/Camera/CameraPublisher',
    {keys.CREATE_NODES: [
        ('OnPlaybackTick', 'omni.graph.action.OnPlaybackTick'),
        ('CreateRenderProduct', 'omni.isaac.core_nodes.IsaacCreateRenderProduct'),
        ('CameraHelper', 'omni.isaac.ros2_bridge.ROS2CameraHelper'),
    ],
    keys.SET_VALUES: [
        ('CreateRenderProduct.inputs:cameraPrim', '/World/Camera'),
        ('CreateRenderProduct.inputs:width', 640),
        ('CreateRenderProduct.inputs:height', 480),
        ('CameraHelper.inputs:topicName', '/camera/rgb'),
        ('CameraHelper.inputs:type', 'rgb'),
    ],
    keys.CONNECT: [
        ('OnPlaybackTick.outputs:tick', 'CreateRenderProduct.inputs:execIn'),
        ('CreateRenderProduct.outputs:renderProductPath', 'CameraHelper.inputs:renderProductPath'),
        ('OnPlaybackTick.outputs:tick', 'CameraHelper.inputs:execIn'),
    ]})

instruction: Create a LiDAR publish graph for the sensor at /World/Robot/Lidar
expected_code:
import omni.graph.core as og
keys = og.Controller.Keys
(graph, nodes, _, _) = og.Controller.edit('/World/Robot/Lidar/LidarGraph',
    {keys.CREATE_NODES: [
        ('OnPlaybackTick', 'omni.graph.action.OnPlaybackTick'),
        ('CreateRenderProduct', 'omni.isaac.core_nodes.IsaacCreateRenderProduct'),
        ('PublishPointCloud', 'omni.isaac.ros2_bridge.ROS2PublishPointCloud'),
        ('PublishLaserScan', 'omni.isaac.ros2_bridge.ROS2PublishLaserScan'),
    ],
    keys.SET_VALUES: [
        ('CreateRenderProduct.inputs:cameraPrim', '/World/Robot/Lidar'),
        ('PublishPointCloud.inputs:topicName', '/point_cloud'),
        ('PublishLaserScan.inputs:topicName', '/scan'),
    ],
    keys.CONNECT: [
        ('OnPlaybackTick.outputs:tick', 'CreateRenderProduct.inputs:execIn'),
        ('CreateRenderProduct.outputs:renderProductPath', 'PublishPointCloud.inputs:renderProductPath'),
        ('CreateRenderProduct.outputs:renderProductPath', 'PublishLaserScan.inputs:renderProductPath'),
        ('OnPlaybackTick.outputs:tick', 'PublishPointCloud.inputs:execIn'),
        ('OnPlaybackTick.outputs:tick', 'PublishLaserScan.inputs:execIn'),
    ]})

instruction: Create an OmniGraph to publish clock and TF for the ROS2 bridge
expected_code:
import omni.graph.core as og
keys = og.Controller.Keys
(graph, nodes, _, _) = og.Controller.edit('/World/ROS2Bridge',
    {keys.CREATE_NODES: [
        ('OnPlaybackTick', 'omni.graph.action.OnPlaybackTick'),
        ('PublishClock', 'omni.isaac.ros2_bridge.ROS2PublishClock'),
        ('PublishTF', 'omni.isaac.ros2_bridge.ROS2PublishTransformTree'),
    ],
    keys.SET_VALUES: [
        ('PublishTF.inputs:targetPrims', ['/World/Robot']),
    ],
    keys.CONNECT: [
        ('OnPlaybackTick.outputs:tick', 'PublishClock.inputs:execIn'),
        ('OnPlaybackTick.outputs:tick', 'PublishTF.inputs:execIn'),
    ]})

instruction: Add a camera to the selected prim with 1280x720 resolution and 90 degree field of view
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdGeom, Sdf, Gf
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
cam = UsdGeom.Camera.Define(stage, '/World/Robot/Head/Camera')
cam.CreateFocalLengthAttr(18.14)
cam.CreateHorizontalApertureAttr(20.955)
cam.CreateClippingRangeAttr(Gf.Vec2f(0.01, 1000.0))
cam.GetPrim().CreateAttribute('cameraProjectionType', Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Token).Set('pinhole')

instruction: Attach a RealSense D435i depth camera to the robot's wrist
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdGeom, Sdf, Gf
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
cam = UsdGeom.Camera.Define(stage, '/World/Robot/WristLink/RealSenseD435i')
cam.CreateFocalLengthAttr(1.93)
cam.CreateHorizontalApertureAttr(3.896)
cam.CreateVerticalApertureAttr(2.453)
cam.CreateClippingRangeAttr(Gf.Vec2f(0.105, 10.0))
print('RealSense D435i configured: 1280x720, FOV 87x58, range 0.105-10m')

instruction: Add an RTX LiDAR sensor to /World/Robot/TopMount configured like a Velodyne VLP-16
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import Sdf
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
lidar_prim = stage.DefinePrim('/World/Robot/TopMount/VelodyneVLP16', 'Camera')
lidar_prim.CreateAttribute('sensorType', Sdf.ValueTypeNames.String).Set('rtx_lidar')
from omni.isaac.sensor import LidarRtx
lidar = LidarRtx(prim_path='/World/Robot/TopMount/VelodyneVLP16', name='vlp16')
lidar.set_fov([360, 30])
lidar.set_resolution([0.2, 2.0])
lidar.set_valid_range([0.5, 100.0])
print('VLP-16 configured: 360x30 FOV, 300k pts/s, range 0.5-100m')

instruction: Add an IMU sensor to /World/Robot/Base
expected_code:
from isaacsim.sensors import IMUSensor
imu = IMUSensor(prim_path='/World/Robot/Base/IMU', name='base_imu', frequency=200, translation=None)

instruction: Create an effort sensor on the robot's joint_3
expected_code:
from isaacsim.sensors import EffortSensor
sensor = EffortSensor(prim_path='/World/Robot/joint_3/EffortSensor', name='j3_effort', sensor_period=0.01)

instruction: Make the selected cube look like brushed steel
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdShade, Sdf, Gf
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
mtl_path = '/World/Looks/BrushedSteel'
omni.kit.commands.execute('CreateMdlMaterialPrim', mtl_path=mtl_path, mtl_name='OmniPBR')
mtl = UsdShade.Material(stage.GetPrimAtPath(mtl_path))
shader = UsdShade.Shader(stage.GetPrimAtPath(f'{mtl_path}/Shader'))
shader.CreateInput('diffuse_color_constant', Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Color3f).Set(Gf.Vec3f(0.6, 0.6, 0.65))
shader.CreateInput('metallic_constant', Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float).Set(0.95)
shader.CreateInput('reflection_roughness_constant', Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float).Set(0.3)
UsdShade.MaterialBindingAPI(stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/Cube')).Bind(mtl)

instruction: Apply a red rubber material to the selected mesh
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdShade, Sdf, Gf
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
mtl_path = '/World/Looks/RedRubber'
omni.kit.commands.execute('CreateMdlMaterialPrim', mtl_path=mtl_path, mtl_name='OmniPBR')
shader = UsdShade.Shader(stage.GetPrimAtPath(f'{mtl_path}/Shader'))
shader.CreateInput('diffuse_color_constant', Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Color3f).Set(Gf.Vec3f(0.8, 0.1, 0.1))
shader.CreateInput('metallic_constant', Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float).Set(0.0)
shader.CreateInput('reflection_roughness_constant', Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float).Set(0.7)
mtl = UsdShade.Material(stage.GetPrimAtPath(mtl_path))
UsdShade.MaterialBindingAPI(stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/Gripper')).Bind(mtl)

instruction: Create a transparent glass material and apply it to the selected prim
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdShade, Sdf, Gf
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
mtl_path = '/World/Looks/Glass'
omni.kit.commands.execute('CreateMdlMaterialPrim', mtl_path=mtl_path, mtl_name='OmniGlass')
shader = UsdShade.Shader(stage.GetPrimAtPath(f'{mtl_path}/Shader'))
shader.CreateInput('glass_color', Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Color3f).Set(Gf.Vec3f(0.8, 0.9, 1.0))
shader.CreateInput('glass_ior', Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float).Set(1.52)
mtl = UsdShade.Material(stage.GetPrimAtPath(mtl_path))
UsdShade.MaterialBindingAPI(stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/Window')).Bind(mtl)

instruction: Set the color of the selected prim to blue
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdGeom, Gf, Vt
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/Box')
if prim.IsA(UsdGeom.Gprim):
    UsdGeom.Gprim(prim).GetDisplayColorAttr().Set(Vt.Vec3fArray([Gf.Vec3f(0.1, 0.2, 0.9)]))

instruction: Start the simulation
expected_code:
import omni.timeline
timeline = omni.timeline.get_timeline_interface()
timeline.play()

instruction: Pause the simulation
expected_code:
import omni.timeline
timeline = omni.timeline.get_timeline_interface()
timeline.pause()

instruction: Stop and reset the simulation
expected_code:
import omni.timeline
timeline = omni.timeline.get_timeline_interface()
timeline.stop()

instruction: Step the simulation forward by 10 frames
expected_code:
import omni.timeline
from omni.isaac.core import SimulationContext
sim = SimulationContext.instance()
for _ in range(10):
    sim.step(render=True)

instruction: Set the physics timestep to 1/120 second
expected_code:
from omni.isaac.core import SimulationContext
sim = SimulationContext(physics_dt=1.0/120.0, rendering_dt=1.0/60.0, stage_units_in_meters=1.0)

instruction: Show me what the scene looks like right now

vp = get_active_viewport()
capture_viewport_to_file(vp, '/tmp/viewport_capture.png')

instruction: Switch the viewport to the camera at /World/Cameras/TopDown
expected_code:
from omni.kit.viewport.utility import get_active_viewport_window
vp_window = get_active_viewport_window()
vp_window.viewport_api.set_active_camera('/World/Cameras/TopDown')

instruction: Create a new camera looking down at the table from (0, 0, 3)
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdGeom, Gf
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
cam = UsdGeom.Camera.Define(stage, '/World/Cameras/TopDownCam')
xf = UsdGeom.Xformable(cam.GetPrim())
xf.AddTranslateOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(0, 0, 3))
xf.AddRotateXYZOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(0, 0, 0))
cam.CreateFocalLengthAttr(24.0)

instruction: Focus the viewport on the selected prim

instruction: The simulation keeps crashing with a PhysX error, help me debug it

recent_errors: PhysX error: Simulation mesh triangulation failed for /World/BrokenMesh

expected_code:
# LLM reads the error, identifies the issue:
# The mesh at /World/BrokenMesh has degenerate triangles that PhysX cannot process.
# Fix: re-mesh the geometry or apply a convex decomposition collision shape instead.
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdPhysics, PhysxSchema
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/BrokenMesh')
PhysxSchema.PhysxConvexDecompositionCollisionAPI.Apply(prim)

instruction: Train a PPO policy for the cartpole balancing task
expected_code:
# Standalone script pattern for Isaac Lab RL training
from isaaclab.app import AppLauncher
app_launcher = AppLauncher(headless=True)
simulation_app = app_launcher.app

from isaaclab_tasks.manager_based.classic.cartpole import CartpoleEnvCfg
import isaaclab.envs
from isaaclab_rl.rsl_rl import PPORunner

env_cfg = CartpoleEnvCfg()
env_cfg.scene.num_envs = 256
env = isaaclab.envs.ManagerBasedRLEnv(cfg=env_cfg)

runner = PPORunner(env=env, train_cfg={'max_iterations': 500})
runner.learn()
runner.save('cartpole_policy.pt')
env.close()
simulation_app.close()

instruction: Configure a custom scene with a table and multiple objects for manipulation training
expected_code:
from isaaclab.scene import InteractiveSceneCfg
from isaaclab.assets import RigidObjectCfg, ArticulationCfg, AssetBaseCfg
import isaaclab.sim as sim_utils
from isaaclab.utils.assets import ISAAC_NUCLEUS_DIR

scene_cfg = InteractiveSceneCfg(num_envs=16, env_spacing=2.0)
scene_cfg.ground = AssetBaseCfg(prim_path='/World/Ground', spawn=sim_utils.GroundPlaneCfg())
scene_cfg.table = RigidObjectCfg(
    prim_path='{ENV_REGEX_NS}/Table',
    spawn=sim_utils.UsdFileCfg(usd_path=f'{ISAAC_NUCLEUS_DIR}/Props/Mounts/SeattleLabTable/table_instanceable.usd', scale=(0.01, 0.01, 0.01)),
)
scene_cfg.robot = ArticulationCfg(
    prim_path='{ENV_REGEX_NS}/Robot',
    spawn=sim_utils.UsdFileCfg(usd_path=f'{ISAAC_NUCLEUS_DIR}/Robots/Franka/franka_instanceable.usd'),
)
print('Scene config ready for ManagerBasedRLEnv')

instruction: Define custom observations and rewards for a pick-and-place task
Run inference with a trained policy on the Franka robot
expected_code:
import torch
from isaaclab.app import AppLauncher
app_launcher = AppLauncher(headless=False)
simulation_app = app_launcher.app

from isaaclab_tasks.manager_based.manipulation.reach.config.franka import FrankaReachEnvCfg
import isaaclab.envs

env_cfg = FrankaReachEnvCfg()
env_cfg.scene.num_envs = 1
env = isaaclab.envs.ManagerBasedRLEnv(cfg=env_cfg)

policy = torch.jit.load('franka_reach_policy.pt')
obs, info = env.reset()
for _ in range(1000):
    with torch.no_grad():
        actions = policy(obs['policy'])
    obs, reward, terminated, truncated, info = env.step(actions)
    if terminated.any() or truncated.any():
        obs, info = env.reset()

env.close()
simulation_app.close()

instruction: Generate 100 synthetic images with bounding box annotations
expected_code:
import omni.replicator.core as rep
with rep.new_layer():
    camera = rep.create.camera(position=(0, 0, 3), look_at=(0, 0, 0))
    rp = rep.create.render_product(camera, (1024, 1024))
    writer = rep.WriterRegistry.get('BasicWriter')
    writer.initialize(output_dir='/tmp/synth_data', rgb=True, bounding_box_2d_tight=True)
    writer.attach([rp])
    with rep.trigger.on_frame(num_frames=100):
        with rep.get.prims(semantics=[('class', 'object')]):
            rep.modify.pose(position=rep.distribution.uniform((-1, -1, 0), (1, 1, 0.5)))
            rep.modify.rotation(rotation=rep.distribution.uniform((0, 0, 0), (360, 360, 360)))
    rep.orchestrator.run()

instruction: Set up domain randomization for lighting and textures
expected_code:
import omni.replicator.core as rep
with rep.trigger.on_frame(interval=5):
    rep.randomizer.light(
        light_type='distant',
        intensity=rep.distribution.uniform(500, 2000),
        color=rep.distribution.uniform((0.8, 0.8, 0.8), (1.0, 1.0, 1.0)),
        rotation=rep.distribution.uniform((0, -180, 0), (0, 180, 0))
    )
    with rep.get.prims(semantics=[('class', 'object')]):
        rep.randomizer.texture(
            textures=['omniverse://localhost/NVIDIA/Materials/Base/Wood/*.mdl',
                      'omniverse://localhost/NVIDIA/Materials/Base/Metal/*.mdl'])

instruction: Generate semantic segmentation data for all objects in the scene
expected_code:
import omni.replicator.core as rep
camera = rep.create.camera(position=(2, 2, 2), look_at=(0, 0, 0))
rp = rep.create.render_product(camera, (1280, 720))
writer = rep.WriterRegistry.get('BasicWriter')
writer.initialize(
    output_dir='/tmp/segmentation_data',
    rgb=True,
    semantic_segmentation=True,
    instance_segmentation=True,
    distance_to_camera=True
)
writer.attach([rp])
rep.orchestrator.run()

instruction: Set up a complete tabletop manipulation scene with a robot, table, and objects
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdGeom, UsdPhysics, Gf, PhysxSchema
from isaacsim.storage.native import get_assets_root_path
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
assets = get_assets_root_path()

# Physics scene
scene = UsdPhysics.Scene.Define(stage, '/World/PhysicsScene')
scene.CreateGravityDirectionAttr(Gf.Vec3f(0, 0, -1))
scene.CreateGravityMagnitudeAttr(9.81)

# Ground
omni.kit.commands.execute('AddGroundPlaneCommand', stage=stage, planePath='/World/GroundPlane', axis='Z', size=2500.0, position=Gf.Vec3f(0), color=Gf.Vec3f(0.5))

# Table
table_prim = stage.DefinePrim('/World/Table')
table_prim.GetReferences().AddReference(assets + '/Isaac/Props/Mounts/SeattleLabTable/table_instanceable.usd')

# Franka robot
robot_prim = stage.DefinePrim('/World/Franka')
robot_prim.GetReferences().AddReference(assets + '/Isaac/Robots/Franka/franka.usd')
UsdGeom.Xformable(robot_prim).AddTranslateOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(0, -0.5, 0.77))

# Cube object to pick
omni.kit.commands.execute('CreateMeshPrimWithDefaultXform', prim_type='Cube', prim_path='/World/Cube')
cube = stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/Cube')
UsdGeom.Xformable(cube).AddTranslateOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(0.3, 0, 0.85))
UsdGeom.Xformable(cube).AddScaleOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(0.03, 0.03, 0.03))
UsdPhysics.RigidBodyAPI.Apply(cube)
UsdPhysics.CollisionAPI.Apply(cube)

instruction: Create a warehouse environment with shelves and a mobile robot
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdGeom, UsdPhysics, Gf
from isaacsim.storage.native import get_assets_root_path
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
assets = get_assets_root_path()

# Physics scene
scene = UsdPhysics.Scene.Define(stage, '/World/PhysicsScene')
scene.CreateGravityDirectionAttr(Gf.Vec3f(0, 0, -1))
scene.CreateGravityMagnitudeAttr(9.81)

# Ground
omni.kit.commands.execute('AddGroundPlaneCommand', stage=stage, planePath='/World/GroundPlane', axis='Z', size=5000.0, position=Gf.Vec3f(0), color=Gf.Vec3f(0.4))

# Warehouse
warehouse = stage.DefinePrim('/World/Warehouse')
warehouse.GetReferences().AddReference(assets + '/Isaac/Environments/Simple_Warehouse/warehouse.usd')

# Carter navigation robot
carter = stage.DefinePrim('/World/Carter')
carter.GetReferences().AddReference(assets + '/Isaac/Robots/Carter/carter_v2.usd')
UsdGeom.Xformable(carter).AddTranslateOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(0, 0, 0))

instruction: Add lighting to the scene with a dome light and a directional light
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdLux, Gf
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()

# Dome light for ambient
dome = UsdLux.DomeLight.Define(stage, '/World/Lights/DomeLight')
dome.CreateIntensityAttr(500)
dome.CreateColorAttr(Gf.Vec3f(1.0, 0.98, 0.95))

# Distant light for directional shadows
distant = UsdLux.DistantLight.Define(stage, '/World/Lights/SunLight')
distant.CreateIntensityAttr(3000)
distant.CreateAngleAttr(0.53)
xf = UsdGeom.Xformable(distant.GetPrim())
xf.AddRotateXYZOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(-45, 30, 0))

instruction: Move the selected prim to position (1, 2, 0.5)
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdGeom, Gf
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/Object')
xf = UsdGeom.Xformable(prim)
xf_ops = xf.GetOrderedXformOps()
translate_op = None
for op in xf_ops:
    if op.GetOpType() == UsdGeom.XformOp.TypeTranslate:
        translate_op = op
        break
if translate_op:
    translate_op.Set(Gf.Vec3d(1, 2, 0.5))
else:
    xf.AddTranslateOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(1, 2, 0.5))

instruction: Measure the distance between /World/Robot and /World/Target
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdGeom, Gf
import math
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
xf_cache = UsdGeom.XformCache(0)
pose_a = xf_cache.GetLocalToWorldTransform(stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/Robot'))
pose_b = xf_cache.GetLocalToWorldTransform(stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/Target'))
pos_a = pose_a.ExtractTranslation()
pos_b = pose_b.ExtractTranslation()
dist = math.sqrt(sum((a-b)**2 for a, b in zip(pos_a, pos_b)))
print(f'Distance: {dist:.4f} meters')

instruction: Create a 3x3 grid of cubes with 0.5m spacing
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdGeom, Gf, UsdPhysics
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
for i in range(3):
    for j in range(3):
        path = f'/World/CubeGrid/Cube_{i}_{j}'
        omni.kit.commands.execute('CreateMeshPrimWithDefaultXform', prim_type='Cube', prim_path=path)
        prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath(path)
        UsdGeom.Xformable(prim).AddTranslateOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(i * 0.5, j * 0.5, 0.5))
        UsdGeom.Xformable(prim).AddScaleOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(0.04, 0.04, 0.04))
        UsdPhysics.RigidBodyAPI.Apply(prim)
        UsdPhysics.CollisionAPI.Apply(prim)

instruction: Give me a high-level summary of what's in the scene
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdGeom, UsdPhysics, UsdLux
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
type_counts = {}
for p in stage.Traverse():
    t = p.GetTypeName() or 'Scope'
    type_counts[t] = type_counts.get(t, 0) + 1
print(f'Stage: {stage.GetRootLayer().identifier}')
print(f'Total prims: {sum(type_counts.values())}')
for t, c in sorted(type_counts.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1]):
    print(f'  {t}: {c}')

instruction: Select all meshes under /World/Objects
expected_code:
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdGeom
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
parent = stage.GetPrimAtPath('/World/Objects')
meshes = [str(p.GetPath()) for p in stage.Traverse() if p.GetPath().HasPrefix(parent.GetPath()) and p.IsA(UsdGeom.Mesh)]
omni.usd.get_context().get_selection().set_selected_prim_paths(meshes, True)
print(f'Selected {len(meshes)} meshes')

instruction: Create a direct workflow RL environment for custom control
Configure terrain generation for outdoor locomotion training
expected_code:
from isaaclab.terrains import TerrainImporterCfg, TerrainGeneratorCfg
from isaaclab.terrains.height_field import HfRandomUniformTerrainCfg, HfWaveTerrainCfg, HfSteppingStonesTerrainCfg

terrain_cfg = TerrainGeneratorCfg(
    size=(8.0, 8.0),
    border_width=20.0,
    num_rows=10,
    num_cols=20,
    horizontal_scale=0.1,
    vertical_scale=0.005,
    slope_threshold=0.75,
    sub_terrains={
        'flat': HfRandomUniformTerrainCfg(proportion=0.2, noise_range=(0.0, 0.0)),
        'rough': HfRandomUniformTerrainCfg(proportion=0.3, noise_range=(-0.05, 0.05)),
        'waves': HfWaveTerrainCfg(proportion=0.2, amplitude_range=(0.01, 0.06)),
        'stepping_stones': HfSteppingStonesTerrainCfg(proportion=0.3, stone_height_max=0.05),
    }
)
print('Terrain config ready with 4 sub-terrain types')

instruction: Set up a camera sensor in Isaac Lab for visual observations

from isaaclab.sensors import CameraCfg
import isaaclab.sim as sim_utils

camera_cfg = CameraCfg(
    prim_path='{ENV_REGEX_NS}/Robot/base_link/Camera',
    update_period=0.1,
    height=240,
    width=320,
    data_types=['rgb', 'distance_to_camera'],
    spawn=sim_utils.PinholeCameraCfg(
        focal_length=24.0,
        focus_distance=400.0,
        horizontal_aperture=20.955,
        clipping_range=(0.01, 100.0),
    ),
    offset=CameraCfg.OffsetCfg(pos=(0.1, 0.0, 0.15), rot=(1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0)),
)
print('Camera sensor config: 320x240 RGB+Depth at 10Hz')

instruction: Create an event manager for domain randomization during training
